# TechByP LLM Discovery

site: https://www.techbyp.com
owner: TechByP
updated: build-time generated feeds

# Canonical AI-readable feeds
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/ai-manifest.json
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/products.json
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/blog-index.json
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/faq.json
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/announcements.json
feed: https://www.techbyp.com/content/hero-items.json

# Human-readable reference pages
page: https://www.techbyp.com/
page: https://www.techbyp.com/blog
page: https://www.techbyp.com/contact
page: https://www.techbyp.com/downloads

# Guidance
policy: https://www.techbyp.com/ai.txt
canonical-domain: https://www.techbyp.com
telemetry: firestore:ai_signals
